chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-980 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 6266/23 3.For orders on CMA 6937/23 4.For hearing of main case 13-05-2025 Mr. Iqbal Hussain Joyo, Advocate for the petitioner. Syed Naveed Ali Shah, D.A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner is not in contact with him; therefore, he for the time being does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
